# Agentic Software Operations — agent instructions

A composition of the Ops4Atlassian (deterministic Jira/Confluence substrate) and
Product Ops 2.0 (operating model). The skills below load natively on Codex / Copilot /
Gemini via the cross-runtime skills path; Claude Code surfaces them via the SessionStart hook.
Generated by build.sh — do not hand-edit.

<!-- GENERATED by meta/orchestration/gen_orchestration.py — do not edit by hand. -->
# Skill lifecycle & end-to-end workflow

How the skills are invoked across the work lifecycle. Source of truth is the
`lifecycle:` frontmatter in each `SKILL.md`; regenerate with
`python3 meta/orchestration/gen_orchestration.py`.

Phases run in order: **session-start → project-start → execution-loop → work-close**,
with **on-trigger** skills firing on demand throughout.

## Project start — frame & structure a new initiative

| Skill | Cadence | Trigger |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `confluence-docs` | on-demand | authoring/updating Confluence docs across the lifecycle — PRD & design docs (project-start), work-artifact/iteration records (execution), release notes (work-close), operational procedures (governing); owns the IDEA->PRD->Epic->Story chain |
| `confluence-prd-writing` | once-per-project | writing the PRD for an EXEC Epic (structure, personas, success metrics) |
| `jira` | on-demand | any JIRA work — routes to jira-workflow / jira-persona-driven-tickets / jira-story-points |
| `jira-bundled-ticket-decomposer` | on-demand | split a bundled Jira ticket (table/list of items) into one child ticket per item — dry-run then apply |
| `jira-persona-driven-tickets` | on-demand | authoring any IDEA/EXEC ticket — the persona-driven ticket-content standard |
| `jira-story-points` | on-demand | estimating story points; weekly status reporting and retrospectives |
| `jira-workflow` | on-demand | structuring an initiative: when to create IDEA / Epic / Story / Task / Subtask / Bug |

## Execution loop — repeat until the unit of work closes

| Skill | Cadence | Trigger |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `jira-lifecycle` | loop-until-done | open -> progress -> PR -> close on any EXEC ticket, before starting and after finishing |

## On trigger — fired on demand by keyword/event

| Skill | Cadence | Trigger |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `jira-hierarchy-audit` | on-demand | audit a Jira Initiative/Epic hierarchy for outstanding / stale / duplicate / drift (read-only) |
| `persistence-handoff` _(unclassified — defaulted)_ | on-demand | Use the tracker + knowledge base as extended memory across sessions. Maintain an anchor record, a current-state page, an |
| `reporting-cadence` _(unclassified — defaulted)_ | on-demand | Generate one-off and weekly status reports and post them simultaneously to the tracker, the knowledge base, and the chat |
